strName.description: The code name of the pledge, as referred to in other files.

strType.description: Enum tag dispatching to game code (repeat, surviveo2, ...). NOT a strName reference; render as a badge.

strIATrigger.description: Interaction whose execution triggers / re-triggers this pledge. Refers to entry within interactions.json.

aIAEnd.description: Array of interaction names that complete this pledge. Each refers to entry within interactions.json.

strIAEmergency.description: Emergency interaction associated with this pledge. Refers to entry within interactions.json.

strThemID.description: Target [them] this pledge is bound to (often null or a placeholder pronoun). When a real strName, refers to entry within condowners.json.
